lemon_market_new_listings.description: This vehicle is in poor condition. The exterior and interior show significant wear and damage. Mechanical components require major repairs and are not fully functional.
Mint condition.

This vehicle is in mint condition. The exterior paint and body have no defects. The interior is in original condition with no signs of wear. All mechanical and electrical systems are fully functional and operate as intended.

This vehicle is in good condition and has been consistently well-maintained. The engine runs strong and the transmission provides smooth, reliable shifts. Inside, the cabin is clean and comfortable, showing only minor wear typical for its age. The exterior paint retains a healthy shine, though there are a few minor cosmetic blemishes such as small stone chips and light surface scratches. Overall, this is a dependable car that has many miles of reliable service left to offer.

Get ready to own a masterpiece! This car is in absolute mint condition, looking and driving exactly like it did the day it rolled off the showroom floor. It has been meticulously cared for, with every detail preserved to perfection. If you're looking for a vehicle that is truly as good as new, this is the one for you!

This vehicle is in good, reliable condition and has been well-cared for by its previous owner. The exterior presents very well with a strong shine, though upon close inspection, you will find a few minor stone chips on the hood and some light surface scratches consistent with careful daily use. Inside, the cabin is clean and well-maintained; the upholstery shows only light wear on the driver's side bolster, and all interior electronics, including the navigation and climate control, function as intended. Mechanically, the car is solid, with a consistent service history and no known major issues. It drives smoothly and handles predictably. A buyer can expect a dependable, attractive vehicle that has been honestly maintained and is ready for the road, showing only the typical, minor signs of mileage.

Presenting a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies reliability and sophisticated engineering. This exceptional example has undergone a rigorous inspection to ensure it meets our exacting standards for performance and aesthetics. Offering a seamless blend of comfort and longevity, it represents a premier opportunity for the discerning driver seeking a high-caliber pre-owned investment.

Hey there! I'm parting ways with my reliable daily driver and it’s in really solid shape. It’s been well-loved and runs like a dream—perfect for anyone looking for a dependable ride without the brand-new price tag. It’s clean, comfortable, and ready for its next adventure. Come check it out and see for yourself!

This BMW E46 M3 is a driver-focused example featuring the high-revving S54 3.2L naturally aspirated inline-six, equipped with individual throttle bodies and a dual-VANOS variable valve timing system recently shimmed to factory tolerances. Power is delivered through a Getrag 6-speed manual gearbox to a variable M-Differential lock, ensuring exceptional torque vectoring across the rear axle. The chassis remains structurally sound with reinforced subframe mounting points and a refreshed suspension setup utilizing high-durometer bushings for sharpened turn-in response. Performance is further augmented by cross-drilled ventilated rotors and multi-piston calipers for consistent thermal management under load. This vehicle offers a visceral, analog connection to the road, with mechanical systems maintained to ensure peak power delivery and kinematic precision.
Used vehicle. Good condition. Mechanically sound. Clean interior. Title ready.

This vehicle has been meticulously maintained and remains in impressive condition, offering a premium driving experience for its next owner. The exterior paint retains a deep, mirror-like shine, with only the minor, superficial imperfections consistent with careful road use. Inside, the cabin is exceptionally clean and smoke-free; the seating surfaces are supple and free of any significant wear, while the dashboard and console remain in excellent aesthetic order. Every electronic feature, from the responsive infotainment system to the dual-zone climate control, functions exactly as intended. Mechanically, the car is robust and reliable, benefiting from a documented history of timely oil changes and preventative maintenance. It handles beautifully, providing a smooth, quiet ride with plenty of power on tap. This is a dependable, well-cared-for example that perfectly bridges the gap between value and luxury.

We are pleased to present this meticulously maintained vehicle, currently offered in commendable mechanical and aesthetic condition. Demonstrating consistent care and reliable performance, this automobile serves as a testament to quality engineering and responsible ownership. An exceptional opportunity for those seeking a balanced fusion of value and prestige.

We are pleased to present this exceptionally well-maintained vehicle, a testament to engineering longevity and diligent ownership. Demonstrating robust mechanical performance and a refined aesthetic, this unit provides an assured driving experience. It stands as a sophisticated acquisition for those seeking uncompromising reliability and proven prestige.

Hey there! I'm parting ways with my trusty car, and she’s been such a joy to drive. It’s been well-loved and kept in really solid shape—super reliable for daily commutes or weekend getaways. Everything runs smoothly, and the interior is nice and clean. It’s a fantastic ride that still has tons of life left in it. I’d love for it to go to someone who will appreciate it as much as I have!

Used vehicle. Good condition. Reliable engine. Clean title. No major issues.

This well-maintained vehicle strikes the perfect balance between luxury and everyday utility. The exterior retains a deep, glossy shine, though closer inspection reveals a few minor stone chips on the hood consistent with regular highway use. Inside, the leather upholstery is supple and free of tears, showing only light softening on the driver's bolster. Mechanically, it is sound; the engine pulls smoothly, the transmission shifts are crisp, and all electronic features—including the premium sound system and navigation—function as intended. Recently serviced with fresh fluids and a multi-point inspection, this car offers a reliable and comfortable driving experience. It has been garage-kept and smoke-free, preserving a clean, inviting interior for its next owner.

We are pleased to present this exceptionally maintained vehicle, which exemplifies mechanical reliability and aesthetic integrity. Having undergone a rigorous multi-point inspection, this unit offers a premium driving experience and stands as a testament to diligent prior ownership. It remains in commendable condition, offering a sophisticated balance of performance and long-term value for the discerning driver.

Presented for your consideration is a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies mechanical reliability and consistent performance. This unit has undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection to ensure it meets our rigorous standards for roadworthiness and aesthetic preservation. Featuring a clean interior and a robust drivetrain, it offers a sophisticated driving experience for the discerning buyer. This represents a premier opportunity to acquire a high-caliber vehicle at a competitive market valuation.

Hey there! I’m looking to find a new home for this awesome ride! It’s been such a reliable companion and is still in really great shape for all your upcoming adventures. It’s been well-loved and runs like a charm, so if you’re looking for a solid, dependable car that still looks sharp on the road, this is definitely the one for you. I've taken good care of it, and it's ready to hit the road today. Feel free to reach out if you want to come by and take it for a spin!

This vehicle represents a fantastic opportunity for a buyer seeking a reliable, well-cared-for daily driver. The exterior finish maintains a deep, professional gloss, showing only minor, expected road wear that does not detract from its overall sharp appearance. Inside, the cabin is clean and inviting, with well-preserved upholstery, a clear dashboard, and all electronic features—including the climate control and premium audio system—functioning exactly as they should. Under the hood, the engine runs smoothly and the transmission shifts with precision, a testament to its consistent maintenance history. With a recent service just completed and tires in great shape, this car is mechanically sound and ready for the road. It strikes the perfect balance of aesthetic appeal and dependable performance.

Rigorously inspected to ensure consistent performance, it offers a refined driving experience and exceptional long-term value. Hey there! I’m looking for a new home for this awesome ride. It’s been so reliable for me and is in really solid shape—it's super clean and runs like a dream! Whether you’re heading to work or hitting the road for a weekend trip, this car is ready to go. I've taken great care of it, and I know you're going to love how it handles. Come check it out and see for yourself!

This 997.1 Carrera features the high-revving 3.6L horizontally-opposed six-cylinder, delivering linear power through a precise G97 6-speed manual transaxle. The chassis remains taut with factory-spec Bilstein dampers and updated control arm bushings ensuring sharp turn-in. It benefits from a documented IMS bearing retrofit and a recently serviced cooling system with a high-flow water pump. While the exterior shows minor road patina consistent with its mileage, the mechanical vitals—
Used car. Good condition. Well maintained. Clean title. Reliable performance.

This well-maintained luxury SUV offers a perfect balance of performance and refined comfort. The exterior shines in a deep metallic charcoal, showing only minor road wear consistent with careful use. Inside, the premium leather upholstery remains supple and clean, complemented by a panoramic sunroof and a high-fidelity sound system. Mechanically, the vehicle is sound; it has been serviced regularly, with recent brake and tire replacements ensuring a smooth, confident ride. All electronics, from the intuitive infotainment screen to the heated seating, function exactly as intended. It is a reliable, sophisticated vehicle that has been kept in great shape and is ready for its next owner to drive home today.

Presenting a distinguished vehicle that exemplifies mechanical integrity and sophisticated design. This unit has been meticulously maintained to ensure a superior driving experience, offering a balanced combination of performance and aesthetic appeal. It stands as a testament to durability and refined automotive craftsmanship, providing exceptional value for the discerning driver who demands both reliability and prestige.
